title: HR Manager - Healthcare Division
description:
Our client Riphah International University is looking for a HR Manager - Healthcare Division in Rawalpindi

Riphah International University is seeking an experienced Manager/Deputy Manager HR Healthcare to lead the human resource functions within its healthcare division. This role demands a seasoned HR professional with a minimum of eight years of experience, particularly in the healthcare or hospital sector. The successful candidate must hold a Masters degree in Human Resource Management from an HEC-recognized institution and possess comprehensive knowledge of labor laws, HR compliance, and healthcare regulations.

As a key member of the universitys HR team, this position involves managing HR operations, talent acquisition, and employee relations to ensure alignment with organizational goals and regulatory requirements.

The Manager/Deputy Manager HR Healthcare will oversee a small team of two HR professionals, guiding and mentoring them to enhance HR service delivery. The role requires proficiency in HR Information Systems and performance management systems, with a preference for experience in SAP-HCM. Excellent communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills are essential to drive HR initiatives effectively and foster a compliant, productive work environment.

This position plays a critical role in supporting the universitys mission by maintaining robust HR practices that support workforce excellence and legal adherence within the healthcare sector.
requirements: Master’s degree in Human Resource Management from an HEC-recognized institution.
Minimum 8 years of HR experience, preferably in healthcare or hospital sector.
Strong knowledge of labor laws, HR compliance, and healthcare regulations.
Experience managing HR operations and employee relations.
Ability to lead and manage HR teams.
Experience in talent acquisition and workforce planning.
Knowledge of HR Information Systems (HRIS).
SAP-HCM experience preferred.
Experience designing and managing performance management systems.
Strong communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills.
Ability to conduct training sessions and workshops.
Ability to analyze HR metrics and prepare reports.
Ability to collaborate with senior leadership and external agencies.
Ability to support organizational change initiatives.

title: Android Developer
description:
The team works on internal user communications — including advertising and marketing messages — as well as interface personalization based on user needs and displaying personalized widgets within the application.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain Android apps with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams on feature design, system architecture and A/B experiments.
- Identify and resolve bugs, performance bottlenecks, offline-storage and threading issues using Android Studio Profilers and network-debugging tools (e.g., Charles, Proxyman, Network Inspector).
- Guarantee code quality through unit tests and pull-request practices that meet community guidelines.
- Take part in sprint planning and task decomposition; consider Google Play requirements in delivery.

Conditions & Benefits

- Stable salary, official employment
- Health insurance
- Hybrid work mode and flexible schedule
- Discount club membership
- Diverse internal training programs
- Partially or fully paid additional training courses
- All necessary work equipment
requirements: 4+ years of commercial Android development.
Strong grasp of Android SDK, Kotlin, Jetpack (Compose, WorkManager), experience with Retrofit/OkHttp, DataStore, Coroutines.
Experience with offline storage and multithreading/modern concurrency (Coroutines).
Familiarity with RESTful APIs; experience with network debugging.
Base knowledge in Computer Science; Git proficiency (branches, PRs, responding to reviews).
Understanding of Clean Architecture and common patterns (MVVM/MVI) with the ability to apply them in practice.

title: Customer Success Specialist
description:
ibex. Pakistan is offering an exciting fresh job opportunity in Karachi/Lahore/Islamabad! We are looking for a Customer Success Specialist within the operations department who will be responsible for handling a large number of incoming calls for customer issues and inquiries on a daily basis. The ideal candidate should have good excellent English and communication skills, be professional, empathetic and discrete while handling sensitive information. They should also have the ability to manage multiple priorities with a calm and results-focused approach. Having prior experience in dealing with international customers – even better if they were based in USA – is a big plus. But above that, the candidate should have a can-do attitude, good work ethics and be passionate about working in a dynamic customer support environment. PS: A sense of humor would help too! Disclaimer: This is not a sales-based job.  

Job Description
- Professionally manage a high volume of incoming calls from US-based customers and cater to their complaints, requests, order status, follow-ups, and general inquiries promptly
- Provide accurate information on products/services, pricing, availability, delivery timelines, warranties, return policies, and general support procedures
- Convey interest in each customer through their words with courtesy, attention, a friendly and caring image
- Providing alternatives to products/items, which are not available on the ecommerce website
- Accurately identify customer needs, troubleshoot issues, and provide clear and correct solutions. Ensure that all resolutions are provided in strict accordance with ibex. Pakistan’s standard processes and procedures
- Deliver exceptional customer service to every customer with empathy, patience and in a composed manner
- Provide a positive customer experience by demonstrating cultural awareness, courteous language, and appropriate communication etiquette across the USA region
- Use and record data on multiple software applications (Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software, order management systems (OMS) and knowledge base systems (KBS)), while actively listening and speaking with the customer simultaneously on call
- Strive to meet and exceed individual and team performance metrics, including Net Promoter Score (NPS), Customer Satisfaction (CSAT), First Call Resolution (FCR) and Average Handling Time (AHT)
- Collect customer feedback and share insights with supervisors to improve service quality and solve any recurring issues
- Staying up to date with latest updates on CRM and other systems information, process changes and future updates
requirements: Exceptional verbal communication skills in English is a must
Candidates must possess a clear American accent to easily explain and help the customer base in US
Candidate should be minimum Matric or O Levels pass. Bachelor’s degree or diploma would be a plus
Candidate should be 18 years or older (You will be required to show your CNIC during the interview)
Basic knowledge of common office tools like Microsoft Office/Google Workspace, Excel and document formatting
Experience using CRM systems is a bonus
Fresh graduates and students searching for entry-level roles or call center jobs in Karachi/Lahore/Islamabad are encouraged to apply

title: International CSR (International Business Developer)
description:

This full-time onsite role requires a minimum of two years' experience in sales, business development, or international client relations. The candidate will present services, generate sales, and maintain strong client relationships while receiving training in SEO and digital marketing.

Key Responsibilities:

- Engage with international clients via calls, emails, and online meetings to understand business goals and challenges.
- Present and explain SEO and digital marketing services, including packages, pricing, and benefits.
- Convert leads into sales and meet or exceed monthly sales targets.
- Build and maintain long-term client relationships to foster trust and repeat business.
- Conduct follow-ups to convert inquiries into confirmed sales.
- Maintain detailed records of leads, communications, and sales activities using CRM and other tools.
- Apply training in SEO and digital marketing to improve service knowledge.
- Collaborate with internal SEO and project teams to ensure smooth project delivery and client satisfaction.
- Maintain a professional attitude and represent the company in all communications and engagements.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree required.
Minimum 2 years of experience in sales, business development, or international client relations.
Strong verbal and written communication skills in English.
Strong sales and negotiation skills with a target-driven mindset.
Ability to engage with international clients through calls, emails, and online meetings.
Experience in client relationship management and follow-ups.
Familiarity with CRM systems and recordkeeping.

title: Associate Director
description:
MICADR is at an inflection point. We have built something rare: a Federal Government and Sindh Hight Court notified mediation centre with Supreme Court patronage, IMI accreditation, a trained practitioner network, and an established roster of corporate members and judicial partners.

The Associate Director will be a person who builds a financial infrastructure working towards self-sustainability of MICADR. This is a leadership role with full authority to build the team, set the commercial direction, and drive MICADR to financial independence within a defined three-year horizon. You will report directly to the Chief Executive Officer and lead an organisation whose institutional assets are genuinely difficult to replicate.

Key responsibilities
Own MICADR's Financial Performance: Set annual revenue targets across MICADR's three pillars - training, cases, and corporate membership - monitor monthly performance, and hold pillar leads accountable to outcomes. The incumbent will also be expected to create out of the box options to enhance and consolidate the financial health of MICADR
Lead Senior Business Development: Build and maintain relationships with corporates, law firms, chambers of commerce, judicial institutions, and government bodies etc. MICADR's growth depends on converting institutional credibility into a pipeline, and the BD leads that effort at the senior level.
Build and Manage the Team: Recruit, onboard, and manage the Training Manager, Cases Manager, BD & Membership Manager, and Operations Officer. Set a performance culture from day one.
Represent MICADR Externally: Conferences, regulatory engagements, media appearances, judicial forums, and stakeholder events. MICADR needs a credible public face who can hold a room.
Report to the Board: Quarterly P&L presentations with clear analysis of revenue performance, pipeline status, and forward outlook. The Board sets strategy; the AD executes it.
requirements: Minimum 10 years of leadership experience in professional services, institutional management, ADR practice, or a related field.
A demonstrable track record of owning revenue targets and delivering results
Credibility in the Corporate and/or legal market, with an existing senior network you are prepared to activate.
The management instinct to build a high-performing team and hold it accountable without micromanagement.

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Economics, Marketing, Management, or related fields will be preferred; professional qualifications such as IMI accreditation or equivalent ADR certification will be considered an added advantage.

The ideal candidate will be responsible for monitoring production KPIs, supervising line staff, managing equipment maintenance, and implementing continuous improvement initiatives to enhance productivity, quality, and cost efficiency.

Responsibilities
Daily monitoring and analysis of key performance indicators (KPIs) to ensure production targets are met.

Supervise all production line staff, providing guidance, training, and support to ensure efficient operations.

Responsible for routine and annual maintenance of production equipment and machinery to ensure optimal performance and minimize downtime.

Identify and implement improvements to increase yield and production efficiency.

Initiate and manage cost-saving measures and productivity improvements to enhance overall operational efficiency.
requirements: BS Mechanical or BS Electrical degree required.
2–3 years of experience in production or manufacturing operations.
Ability to monitor and analyze production KPIs.
Experience supervising production line staff.
Knowledge of routine and annual maintenance of production equipment and machinery.
Ability to identify and implement production efficiency improvements.
Experience in managing cost-saving and productivity improvement initiatives.
Strong technical and operational problem-solving abilities.

title: Front Desk / Admin Officer
description:
Future Serve Overseas Education Services is seeking a responsible, organized, and detail-oriented Front Desk / Admin Officer to support daily office operations and student processing tasks.

The ideal candidate should be proactive, efficient, and capable of handling multiple administrative responsibilities while ensuring smooth workflow within the organization.

Key Responsibilities

1. Administrative & Documentation Management

· Perform document handling tasks including scanning, renaming, copying, and organizing files

· Edit and format student documents, including CVs and application materials

· Print, tag, and maintain proper filing of student records and assessment forms

· Prepare and organize welcome envelopes and required materials for new students

2. Student Support & Coordination

· Welcome students and assist them in completing assessment forms

· Create email accounts for new applicants

· Guide students on basic requirements

· Ensure all necessary documents are properly arranged before processing

3. Data Management & Record Keeping

· Maintain and update student databases according to company procedures

· Keep accurate records of student deposits and payments

· Update and manage daily staff attendance, login sheets, and reports

· Share attendance, login, and break reports with management daily

4. Office Operations & Inventory Control

· Monitor and manage office inventory, including stationery and equipment

· Ensure availability of all required materials for daily operations

· Maintain organized and efficient office systems

5. Technical & Interview Support

· Ensure laptops, headphones, and other equipment are ready before student interviews

· Assist in setting up and managing interview sessions

· Provide basic technical support during credibility interviews

6. Coordination & Compliance

· Follow company SOPs for all administrative and student-related processes

· Maintain confidentiality of student records and company data

· Support team members in daily operational tasks
requirements: Minimum Bachelor’s degree preferred.
6 months to 1 year experience in administration or education consultancy.
Strong organizational and time management skills.
Good communication skills in English and Urdu.
Proficiency in MS Office and basic computer operations.
Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
Experience handling documents, records, and office files.
Ability to manage student databases and administrative reports.
Knowledge of office inventory management and daily operations.
Strong teamwork, punctuality, and professional work ethics.
Must be able to work in Peshawar (In-person).

title: Security Guard
description:
Patrolling and monitoring activities on the company’s premises regularly to discourage criminals and ensure the environment is safe and secure.
Controlling the entrance and departure of employees, visitors and vehicles according to protocols.
Monitoring surveillance cameras to watch out for any disruptions or unlawful activities.
requirements: Minimum 1 year of experience as a Security Guard or related role.
Ability to patrol and monitor company premises regularly.
Experience controlling entry and exit of employees, visitors, and vehicles.
Knowledge of monitoring CCTV and surveillance systems.
Ability to identify and report suspicious or unlawful activities.
Strong sense of responsibility and discipline.
Good physical fitness and alertness.
Ability to work morning shifts and follow security protocols.
Male candidates aged between 20–45 years preferred.
Minimum education required: Matric.
Must be able to work in Gujrat, Punjab.

title: 3-Month Paid Training Program
description:
Program Duration: 3 Months (Paid Training Program)
Location: Remote (Night shift - US Working hours)

Overview
We are offering a structured, paid trainee program for high-performing Computer Science students and recent graduates who want to gain real-world experience and transition into full-time roles.

This is a performance-driven, remote program focused on practical learning, accountability, and measurable outcomes.

Career Path at Lorphic
Top-performing trainees will be offered full-time remote positions upon successful completion of the program.

This program is designed as a direct hiring pipeline.

After the 3-month training period, top-performing trainees will be offered full-time roles at Lorphic, based on performance, consistency, and overall contribution.

Why This Program?

Real-world, production-level experience
Structured learning with clear outcomes
Direct pathway to long-term employment
Opportunity to build a strong professional portfolio
How to Apply?

Please submit:

Updated CV
Academic transcript
A short statement (5–7 lines): Why are you a strong fit for this Trainee program?
Note: This is a paid training program with high performance expectations. Apply only if you are ready to commit and grow in a fast-paced, results-driven environment.
requirements: Final-year Computer Science student or recent graduate.
Minimum GPA of 3.5 / 4.0 required.
Strong academic background preferred (NUST, LUMS, COMSATS, etc.).
Personal laptop suitable for development work.
Stable high-speed internet connection.
Ability to work remotely in a focused environment.
Available for full-time commitment (Mon–Fri, Night Shift).
Strong communication and responsiveness skills.
Ability to work in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.
Willingness to learn and complete weekly deliverables.
Interest in SEO, Web Development, or Content Writing.

title: Flutter developer
description: We are looking for a young and talented flutter developer that create multi-platform apps for iOS and Android using Google's new Flutter development framework. A person should be a "Team Player", "Sincere with him and others", "Dedicated and Committed with his work"

title: Graphic Designer And Video Editor (Social Media)
description: Logic Mount is seeking a skilled Video Editor with at least five years of experience to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate is proficient in video editing, colour grading, motion graphics, audio editing, and visual effects, utilising industry-standard tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, Adobe After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve. This role requires a professional who can independently manage their workload, meet deadlines, and contribute to the creative direction of video content that aligns with brand standards. Exceptional English communication skills, both written and spoken, are essential to effectively collaborate and contribute to various projects. The Video Editor will work closely with the marketing and content teams to develop engaging multimedia content for multiple social media platforms including Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X, and Facebook. Extensive experience in posting and managing social media accounts is necessary to ensure video content achieves maximum audience engagement and visibility. This position does not involve managing a team, but it requires a high level of autonomy, creativity, and expertise in video production processes to support Logic Mount's digital marketing goals.
requirements: 4–6 years of experience in video editing and graphic design.
Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, and DaVinci Resolve.
Strong skills in motion graphics, color grading, audio editing, and visual effects.
Experience creating and managing content for Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, and X.
Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects within deadlines.
Strong creative thinking and visual storytelling abilities.
Good understanding of social media trends and digital marketing strategies.
Excellent written and spoken English communication skills (UK English preferred).
Ability to collaborate effectively with marketing and content teams.
Knowledge of copyright laws and usage rights for media content.
Must be based in Pakistan.
High school diploma or equivalent required.

title: IT Lead Generation & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:

title: Logo Designer
description: Ezec Production is a modern digital agency based in Hyderabad, dedicated to helping businesses grow online. We specialize in custom web development, branding, e-commerce solutions, and digital marketing services. Our mission is to provide brands with a strong digital identity through clean design and smart strategies. We are currently seeking a talented Logo Designer with 3 years of experience to join our creative team.
requirements: Design unique and innovative logos that align with our client's brand identities.
Collaborate with clients to understand their vision and requirements.
Create high-quality visual concepts and present them to clients.
Revise designs based on feedback and deliver final artwork for print and digital use.
Stay current with industry trends and design tools to maintain a competitive edge.

title: Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager
description:
We are looking for an experienced and results-driven Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager to own LondonShine's entire online presence. This is a leadership role — not just execution. The right candidate will build the brand's digital identity from the ground up, manage campaigns, and drive measurable growth across all digital channels.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop and execute a comprehensive social media and digital marketing strategy aligned with LondonShine's brand identity
- Manage and grow LondonShine's presence across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, and other relevant platforms
- Plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns (Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads) to drive brand awareness and sales
- Create and oversee a content calendar — coordinating with graphic designers and videographers for high-quality content production
- Monitor analytics and campaign performance, producing regular reports with actionable insights
- Build and manage influencer/ambassador partnerships to amplify brand reach
- Drive e-commerce traffic and support online sales growth through digital channels
- Stay current with digital trends, platform algorithm changes, and competitor activity
requirements: 3–5 years of proven experience in social media management, digital marketing, or brand marketing
Strong hands-on experience with Meta Business Suite, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads Manager
Demonstrated success in running paid ad campaigns with measurable ROI
Experience in FMCG, consumer goods, or product branding is a strong advantage
Proficiency in content planning tools (e.g. Hootsuite, Buffer, Meta Planner)
Basic graphic sense and ability to brief/direct creative teams effectively
Strong written communication skills — capable of crafting compelling brand copy in English and Urdu
Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field
Drive traffice to the website, stores and social media pages

description:

The social media Handler will be responsible for creating, curating, and managing content for all social media platforms, ensuring brand consistency across channels. Daily tasks include scheduling posts, monitoring analytics, managing online communities, and engaging with audiences to increase reach and grow the brand’s digital presence. This role requires staying updated with industry trends, running social media campaigns, and collaborating with other departments for cohesive branding.
requirements: Minimum of a Bachelors degree (14 years).
Marketing, Media, or Communication Studies.

Experience in managing online communities and engaging with audiences to grow brand reach.
Ability to stay updated with current digital trends and run effective social media campaigns.
Skill in collaborating with other departments to ensure cohesive and consistent branding.
Must be available for a full-time, on-site morning shift in Lahore.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Milkiyat.com, visit our site for more details. https://milkiyat.com/jobs. title: Real Estate Consultant / Team Lead / Manager - Investment Advisor
description:
Imarat Downtown is seeking dynamic, ambitious, and results-driven professionals for the positions of Senior Investment Consultant, Team Lead, and Manager. The ideal candidates will play a key role in expanding market presence by providing professional real estate investment advisory services to high-net-worth individuals, corporate clients, and investors.

The selected candidates will be responsible for generating new business opportunities, managing client relationships, and delivering tailored investment solutions aligned with clients’ investment goals. This role requires strong communication, negotiation, and closing skills, along with the ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.

Candidates with experience in real estate, corporate sales, business development, or investment advisory will be preferred. High-performing individuals will be provided career growth opportunities, including progression into Team Lead and Manager roles.

Develop and execute strategic business development initiatives to expand market presence and drive investment growth
Provide professional real estate investment advisory services to high-net-worth individuals, corporate clients, and investors
Identify and capitalize on new investment opportunities within commercial and residential real estate markets
Build, manage, and grow a portfolio of clients through relationship-driven sales strategies
Conduct professional investment presentations and consultations tailored to client objectives
Achieve and exceed individual and team sales targets through strategic planning and execution
Collaborate with internal teams to align sales strategies with marketing initiatives and business goals
Maintain in-depth knowledge of real estate market trends, competitor activities, and investment opportunities
Negotiate and structure investment deals while ensuring client satisfaction and long-term partnerships
Prepare performance reports, forecasts, and pipeline updates for management review
Support leadership initiatives and contribute to overall business growth strategy
Guide and mentor junior consultants and support team development (for Team Lead / Manager roles)
Represent Imarat Downtown with professionalism in client meetings, corporate engagements, and networking events
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree (Business, Marketing, Management, or related field preferred)
Minimum Bachelor’s Degree (Business, Marketing, Management, or related field preferred)
Minimum 2–5 years of experience in Real Estate, Sales, or Business Development
Strong communication and negotiation skills
Target-driven and self-motivated personality
Professional appearance and client handling skills
Experience in corporate sales or real estate preferred
Ability to handle high-net-worth individuals and corporate clients
Strong relationship-building and closing skills
Leadership potential preferred for Team Lead and Manager roles

title: Business Growth Executive
description:
In this role, the Business Growth Executive will be responsible for driving business opportunities in the Saudi market through proactive outreach and structured sales activities. The candidate will focus on lead generation, client communication, and maintaining a strong sales pipeline.

The role involves actively identifying potential clients, initiating contact through calls and other channels, and scheduling meetings to present company offerings. The candidate will ensure timely follow-ups with prospects to nurture relationships and move opportunities forward in the sales funnel.

A key responsibility includes generating and qualifying leads through telemarketing, networking, and market research, while maintaining accurate and up-to-date records in the CRM system. The candidate will track all interactions, manage prospects efficiently, and ensure proper documentation of the sales pipeline.

Strong communication and coordination skills are essential to engage clients, understand their requirements, and align solutions accordingly. The candidate will also collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth execution and closure of opportunities.

Additionally, the role requires continuous market research to understand industry trends, competitor activities, and potential areas of expansion within the Saudi region. Regular reporting on lead status, follow-ups, and sales activities will be expected to support management in decision-making.
requirements: Graduate
Arabic Language Proficiency (preferred for Saudi region)
Lead Generation & Qualification
Telemarketing & Cold Calling
Strong Verbal & Written Communication
Negotiation & Persuasion Skills
Customer Handling & Relationship Building
Reporting & Documentation

title: Sales Executive (Pharma / Nutraceutical Experience) - Field-Based
description:
We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Sales Executive to expand our footprint in the twin cities. If you have a background in pharmaceutical or nutraceutical sales and a passion for science-backed skincare, we want you on our team. You will be responsible for driving B2B sales, managing retail relationships, and educating healthcare professionals/pharmacists on our product range.

A base salary of PKR 40,000 will be offered to the selected candiadte. With performance based incentives the take home salary could be upto PKR 100,000/-

Market Expansion: Identify and onboard new retail outlets, pharmacies, and skin clinics in Islamabad and Rawalpindi.

Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong rapport with pharmacists, dermatologists, and store managers.

Product Education: Effectively communicate the benefits of our skincare and wellness products (including our specialized night creams and supplements).

Sales Targets: Meet and exceed monthly sales KPIs and collection targets.

Market Intelligence: Provide regular feedback on competitor activity and market trends.

Experience: 2–3 years of proven sales experience specifically in the Pharmaceutical or Nutraceutical sector.

Perks & Benefits: Incentive Bonus and Transport
requirements: Bachelor’s degree (Science or Marketing background preferred).

title: Manager - Risk Strategy and Oversight, Enterprise Risk Management
description: The Manager will oversee risk governance activities, including managing risk committees, maintaining the enterprise-wide risk register, and developing key risk indicators to monitor and escalate risks appropriately. This position also involves preparing comprehensive risk reports and presentations for senior management and the Board Audit Committee. The Manager leads initiatives in digital transformation to enhance risk function capabilities through technology, drives pilot control testing programs in partnership with internal audit, and promotes continuous learning and development in ERM across the company. Effective leadership and mentorship of the risk team ensure a collaborative environment focused on excellence and strategic risk management.
requirements: Risk Assessment and Mitigation
Enterprise Risk Management Frameworks
Stackholder Engaement
Quantitative Risk Assessment (QRA)
Project Management
